text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My shoulders have been aching lately... I
guess that rumor really is true.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um... They say there's, uh... a ghost that shows up
at the track at night.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
B-but I'm not scared, obviously! I don't believe in
ghosts!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Still... I have been doing some solo training at
night, and I've been feeling out of it... S-so it's
been on my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like it really did get to her. She seems a
bit under the weather...
